title: AI Personalised Workout Planner
description: Created AI based workout planner that can provide tailored diet based on the requirements of the user. Added the feature of uploading an image for analyzing body fat with 80% accuracy.

title: Stockify
description: Built Stockify, a MERN-based stock market dashboard with real-time trend visualization. Implemented buy/sell functionality with dynamic portfolio and transaction tracking. Developed REST APIs & JWT authentication for secure user management.
